textPlain: >But, thanks to my CPO and CEO’s support, I can say that we are building software using product bets. We identified a handful to take to the leadership team earlier this year. They estimated the value, then chose a specific set of bets for us to pursue based on our capacity. It’s definitely elevated our conversation around product strategy, and I can see it getting even better as we gain familiarity with the approach.> What we haven’t done yet is finish any bets. We just started our first formal bets this year. So I can’t yet tell you how it will turn out.Sounds good, let's check back in a year!
>To do so, we have to take accountability, rather than [just] allowing it to be forced upon us.Ah, one should think of accountability as a 2-way pipe rather than a sink!
